Metadata.title: Family Dashboard
Metadata.description: The private dashboard for everyday family life.

Home.title: Home
Home.intro: A calm starting point for everything that will bring your family life together.
Home.emptyDescription: Family modules will appear here once they are set up. Until then, the dashboard stays intentionally uncluttered.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.intro: Adjust the appearance and language for this device.
Settings.appearanceDescription: Choose a light, dark, or system-based appearance.
Settings.languageDescription: The selection applies to the current view.

Error.title: Something went wrong
Error.description: The view could not be loaded. Please try again.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.
